message:
Update parse_xml and parse_winlog with See Also components

Convert See Also sections to use Fn and Integration components.
Add parse_xml and parse_winlog to functions overview page.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -703,6 +703,14 @@ functions:
     description: 'Parses a string as tab separated values.'
     example: 'string.parse_tsv(header=["a","b"])'
     path: 'reference/functions/parse_tsv'
+  - name: 'parse_winlog'
+    description: 'Parses a string as a Windows Event Log XML record.'
+    example: 'string.parse_winlog()'
+    path: 'reference/functions/parse_winlog'
+  - name: 'parse_xml'
+    description: 'Parses a string as XML and extracts elements matching an XPath expression.'
+    example: 'string.parse_xml(xpath="//element")'
+    path: 'reference/functions/parse_xml'
   - name: 'parse_xsv'
     description: 'Parses a string as delimiter separated values.'
     example: 'string.parse_xsv(",", ";", "", header=["a","b"])'
@@ -1555,6 +1563,22 @@ string.parse_tsv(header=["a","b"])
 
 </ReferenceCard>
 
+<ReferenceCard title="parse_winlog" description="Parses a string as a Windows Event Log XML record." href="/reference/functions/parse_winlog">
+
+```tql
+string.parse_winlog()
+```
+
+</ReferenceCard>
+
+<ReferenceCard title="parse_xml" description="Parses a string as XML and extracts elements matching an XPath expression." href="/reference/functions/parse_xml">
+
+```tql
+string.parse_xml(xpath="//element")
+```
+
+</ReferenceCard>
+
 <ReferenceCard title="parse_xsv" description="Parses a string as delimiter separated values." href="/reference/functions/parse_xsv">
